home.title: Welcome to the Manor
home.subtitle: The home of tabletop gaming
home.description: Step inside, esteemed guests. GameTable is an exclusive manor dedicated to the art of tabletop gaming. Here you'll find companions, events, and collection management for all tabletop enthusiasts.
home.established: Established 2024 - A Community for Tabletop Gamers

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and settings
profile.privacyDesc: Control what information is visible to other players and manage your profile privacy settings.
profile.showEventActivityDesc: Others will see: 'Attended 3 events this week, organized 1 event this month'
profile.showFriendListDesc: Display your friends list on your public profile
profile.allowFriendRequestsDesc: Allow other players to send you friend requests
profile.showGameCollectionDesc: Display your game collection publicly on your profile
profile.deleteAccountWarning: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
profile.accountManagementDesc: Manage your account data and deletion. These actions cannot be undone.
profile.noFriendsYet: No friends yet. Connect with other gamers!
profile.friendsNote: Your location and game interests are visible to others to help find gaming partners. Direct messaging and event organization are limited to friends.
profile.emailNotificationsDescription: Choose which notifications you'd like to receive by email.
profile.loginToManageNotifications: Please log in to manage your notification preferences.
profile.gameInterestsDesc: Select the types of games you play or are interested in finding partners for.

collection.title: Game Collection
collection.subtitle: Manage your library and discover new games to add to your collection
collection.startCollecting: Start by adding your first game!
collection.marketplaceUpdated: Game status updated in the marketplace
collection.manualEntryDescription: Can't find your game? Add it manually with the details you know.
collection.searchBGGDescription: Search the BoardGameGeek database to add board games to your collection.
collection.searchRPGGDescription: Search the RPGGeek database to add role-playing games to your collection.
collection.searchTCGDescription: Search trading card game databases to add cards to your collection.
collection.searchMiniDescription: Search miniature game databases to add models to your collection.
collection.detailsFailed: Failed to fetch game details. Please try again.
collection.addFailed: Failed to add game. Please try again.
collection.addedToCollection: has been added to your collection! (+10 XP)
collection.bulkImportDescription: Paste your deck list to import multiple cards at once.
collection.deckListPlaceholder:
4 Lightning Bolt
2x Dark Ritual
1 Black Lotus
collection.noParsedItems: No items parsed. Check your format.
collection.searchMiniDescription: Search the BattleScribe database to add miniatures to your collection.
collection.noResults: No games found. Try a different search term.
collection.searchPrompt: Search for a game to add to your collection.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Find and organize gaming events
events.noEventsDesc: Create your first event or check back soon!
events.noMyEventsDesc: Create your first event or join an event to see it here.
events.loginToSeeMyEvents: Please log in to see your events.
events.createFailed: Failed to create event. Please try again.
events.publicDesc: Anyone can see and join this event
events.friendsOnlyDesc: Only your friends can see and join
events.privateDesc: Only invited players can see this event
events.boardGameNightDesc: Host a casual board game evening
events.rpgSessionDesc: Start a new campaign or one-shot
events.managementHubDesc: Comprehensive tools for organizing and managing your gaming events

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Connect with fellow gamers and stay updated with your gaming circle
community.loginToSeeActivity: Log in to see your friends' activity
community.noFriendActivity: No recent activity from friends. Add more friends to see their updates!
community.tryDifferentFilters: Try adjusting your search filters to find gamers in your area.
community.loginToConnect: Please log in to connect with other players
community.refineSearchDescription: Connect with fellow gamers in your area and expand your gaming circle.
community.locationPlaceholder: e.g., Mystic Valley or postal code

discover.title: Discover New Games
discover.subtitle: Search the vast library to find and add games to your personal collection or wishlist.
discover.searchToStart: Search for a game to discover and add to your collection or wishlist.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Connect and communicate with your gaming community
messages.noConversations: No conversations yet. Connect with other players to start chatting!

messages.selectConversation: Select a conversation to start messaging
messages.loginToMessage: Please log in to view and send messages

themes.title: Dimensional Manor System
themes.subtitle: Choose your path through each floor, unlock dimensions, and discover infinite gaming realms
themes.unlockDescription: You can choose which Ground Floor room to unlock next! Complete all 7 to access Second Floor.
themes.portalDescription: Reach Level 100 to unlock the Portal System and access infinite dimensional realms. Each dimension offers unique rooms, fresh XP activities, and completely new ways to experience your gaming journey.
themes.everyDimensionTellsStory: Every dimension tells a different story

trophies.title: Trophy Collection
trophies.subtitle: Achievements earned through dedication and mastery

correspondence.title: Manor Correspondence
correspondence.announcementsDesc: The manor staff may occasionally send important updates about new features, events, or significant announcements. All correspondence maintains the manor's elegant and respectful tone.
correspondence.emailNotificationsDesc: Forward in-app notifications (messages, session suggestions, event invitations) to your email address with elegant manor-themed formatting.
correspondence.saveFailed: Failed to save preferences. Please try again.

eventDigest.title: Weekly Event Digest
eventDigest.enable: Send me a weekly event digest
eventDigest.enableDesc: Receive a curated list of upcoming events in your area every Monday morning.
eventDigest.categoriesDesc: Select which event types to include. Leave empty to receive all categories.
eventDigest.distanceDesc: Only show events within this distance from your location.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with the GameTable team - we're here to help enhance your gaming experience
contact.sendMessageDesc: Have a question, suggestion, or need assistance? We'd love to hear from you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.commitmentDesc: At GameTable, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our gaming community platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.agreementDesc: Welcome to GameTable! These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of the GameTable platform, including our website, mobile applications, and related services.

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

users.notFoundDescription: The user you're looking for doesn't exist or their profile is private.
users.noGamesYet: This user hasn't added any games to their collection yet.
users.noFriendsYet: This user hasn't connected with any friends yet.

hero.subtitle: The Manor opens its doors
hero.description: From board gamers to roleplayers, miniature painters to card collectors — one manor for the entire hobby.

countdown.label: Doors open
countdown.visitors: players waiting for the doors to open

boardGamer.desc: Catalog your collection, find gaming friends, and track every game night.

roleplayer.desc: Find game masters and players, manage campaigns, and keep your character histories safe.

miniatures.desc: Save your army lists, share your painted miniatures, and find other wargame enthusiasts.

cardCollector.desc: Manage your collection, build decks, and trade within the card community.

collection.title: Collection
collection.subtitle: All your games in one place.
collection.desc: Board games, RPG books, miniatures, trading cards — all genres under one collection.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Find players of your genre.
community.desc: Search players by genre and location. Private messages, community profiles, and marketplace.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Game nights. Tournaments. Campaigns.
events.desc: Create events or join them — built-in registration and game list management.

manifesto.quote: Tabletop gaming is one hobby — not four separate communities that don't talk to each other.
